name: Blueberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 3 tablespoons of sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese and 3/4 cup of sugar until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the filling over the crust.
7. Return to the oven and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly before topping with blueberry pie filling and serving.
